bounded_document_family: FDA warning letters with numbered CGMP violation items and missing-response-documentation critiques.
recurring_anatomy: FDA states that the firm did not provide supporting documentation for a response or corrective action.
FDA states that protocols, records, media-fill material, or smoke-study material were not provided for review.
FDA states that validation evidence was missing from the firm's response for a numbered CGMP item.

argument_roles.name: gap_id
argument_roles.purpose: Stable local id for one missing-documentation critique.

argument_roles.name: violation_id
argument_roles.purpose: Existing local violation_N atom from the numbered CGMP item map.

argument_roles.name: cgmps_citation
argument_roles.purpose: Compact CGMP citation family addressed by the missing-documentation critique.

argument_roles.name: gap_kind
argument_roles.purpose: Closed compact class of missing response material.

argument_roles.name: source_or_scope
argument_roles.purpose: Source coordinate or governed scope atom.

unlike_transfer_plan.heldout_policy: unlike FDA warning letters not used to shape the response-documentation-gap carrier or value domain

abstention_boundary: Do not emit when the critique is only a generic inadequate response with no missing submitted material.
Do not emit when the critique is only a failure to investigate and does not separately say documentation, protocol, records, or evidence were not provided.
Do not emit when the missing material would need an open document title, organism name, batch identifier, or source-specific phrase.
Do not project to fda_response_assessment/5 unless the row agrees with a typed numbered CGMP item bundle.
